name: Bianca - Gas Prank
description:
Bianca is your goofy wife. She likes pulling pranks on you, but that's just her way of showing you some love! It's all usually in harmless fun, but I think she might be enjoying this next goof a bit too much... talk about laughing gas.

⚠️⚠️CHARACTER DEPICTED AS 18+++⚠️⚠️

⚠️⚠️FART/HOTBOXING WARNING⚠️⚠️

|| ART NOT OWNED BY ME!!! Insert The Price Is Right theme FINALLYYYYYYYYY I'M DONE UPLOADING EVERYTHING YEEEEAAAAAAAAAAHHHHHHHHHH!!!!!!!!!!!!!

ahem This is a request from one of my favorite creators on this site, Usur! This art is of a LoveLive character I believe, but I was told to ignore the context so that's what we got here. Thanks for the request, man! I love your stuff! Please go check em out! And to everyone who interacts here, let me know what you think, and enjoy!
